bugs.report_text: The header section is collapsing upward and overlapping with the content below due to excessive negative spacing at the bottom.
The dashboard content is displayed in a single column on medium and large screens instead of being distributed across multiple columns, causing unnecessary scrolling.
bugs.neg_code: <div className="w-full grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-6 gap-4 auto-rows-max">

bugs.report_text: The activity feed cannot be updated dynamically because the state update function is missing, leaving the component frozen and unresponsive to new data.
Activity feed items are crowded together without any horizontal spacing, making the list cramped and difficult to read.
bugs.neg_code: <div key={activity.id} className="flex items-center gap-3 pb-3 border-b border-neutral-700/30 last:border-0">
bugs.pos_code: <div key={activity.id} className="flex items-center gap-0 pb-3 border-b border-neutral-700/30 last:border-0">

bugs.report_text: Selected calendar dates are visually indistinguishable from unselected dates because they lack a prominent accent color, making the calendar confusing to use.
Chart bars are stacking vertically down the page instead of displaying horizontally side by side, completely breaking the bar chart visualization.
The stat card icon is abnormally oversized and breaks the card layout, overflowing its designated container.
bugs.neg_code: <div className={`text-3xl w-12 h-12 bg-gradient-to-br ${gradient} rounded-2xl flex items-center justify-center`}>
bugs.pos_code: <div className={`text-33xl w-12 h-12 bg-gradient-to-br ${gradient} rounded-2xl flex items-center justify-center`}>

bugs.report_text: The storage widget bar loses proper visual layering and becomes misaligned with the rest of the widget presentation.
bugs.neg_code: <div className="flex h-6 gap-1 rounded-full overflow-hidden bg-neutral-700/30">
bugs.pos_code: <div className="flex h-6 gap-1 rounded-full overflow-hidden bg-neutral-700/30 relative z-0">

bugs.report_text: Storage bar segments disappear or become invisible because they are positioned behind the background layer, removing the progress bar visualization.
Task list items lose their alignment and proper spacing, causing the list layout to break and appear disorganized.
bugs.neg_code: <label key={task.id} className="flex items-center gap-3 cursor-pointer hover:opacity-75 transition-opacity p-2 rounded-lg">
bugs.pos_code: <label key={task.id} className="flexx items-center gap-3 cursor-pointer hover:opacity-75 transition-opacity p-2 rounded-lg">
